title: Larissa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Larissa with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Larissa has reached a critical level with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a CDD of 9.5 GG and a very low humidity of 26%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 6.5 km/h, but it does not provide much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
